name: Rss

unions.name: DateOrTime
unions.comment:
Can be one of:

  - `Rss.Date` - a `Date` value from `justinmimbs/date`, or
  - `Rss.DateTime` - a `Time.Posix` from `elm/time`.

If you pass in an `Rss.Date`, it will format it at `00:00:00 GMT` on the given date (start of day).
If you pass in an `Rss.DateTime`, it will format the time in UTC.

aliases.name: Item
aliases.comment: Data representing an RSS feed item.
aliases.type: { title : String.String, description : String.String, url : String.String, categories : List.List String.String, author : String.String, pubDate : Rss.DateOrTime, content : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: generate
values.comment: Generate an RSS feed from feed metadata and a list of `Rss.Item`s.
values.type: { title : String.String, description : String.String, url : String.String, lastBuildTime : Time.Posix, generator : Maybe.Maybe String.String, items : List.List Rss.Item, siteUrl : String.String } -> String.String
